layouts.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!-- This file defines the QWERTY (US) layout.

A layout is made of keys arranged into rows. Each keys can be assigned several
symbols.
'key0' assigns the symbol on the middle of the key. 'nw', 'ne', etc.. assign
symbols to the corners of a key, they are arranged following the cardinal
directions:

   nw   n   ne
   w    c    e
   sw   s   se

Symbols prefixed with 'loc ' are not visible on the keyboard. They are used to
specify a place for a key, if it needed to be added to the layout later.
(for example, by the "Add keys to keyboard" option)

Keys can be made bigger with the 'width' attribute and blank space can be added
on the left of a key with the 'shift' attribute.

You can define your own bottom row by simply adding another '<row>...<row/>' tag
then disabling the built-in bottom row by adding 'bottom_row="false"' to the
keyboard metadata.

Useful links.

- Web based editor that will simplify editing of this file.
  https://unexpected-keyboard-layout-editor.lixquid.com

- Full guide on how to edit the layout.
  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/tree/master/doc/Custom-layouts.md

- Current definition of the bottom row (for easy importing).
  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/tree/master/res/xml/bottom_row.xml

- Built-in layouts (for easy importing)
  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/tree/master/srcs/layouts

- Etc
  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/tree/master/res/xml

  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-symbols-to-shift-fn-compose-and-other-modifiers

  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/blob/master/doc/Possible-key-values.md

  https://github.com/Julow/Unexpected-Keyboard/blob/master/doc/Custom-layouts.md
-->
<keyboard name="QWERTY (broccoli)" script="latin" embedded_number_row="true" bottom_row="false">
  <row height="0.6">
    <key width="1" c="esc" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="undo:ctrl,z" nw="" ne="redo:ctrl,Z" sw="undo" se="redo" />
    <key width="1" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c=",c_:',c',space" nw="" ne="" sw=",cc:',cc'" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="cut" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="copy" nw="| xlp↵:'| xlp',enter" ne="𝚌𝚘𝚙𝚢:copy"  sw='"+𝚢𝚢:"+yy' se="" />
    <key width="1" c="paste" nw='"+𝚙:"+p' ne="𝚙𝚊𝚜𝚝𝚎:paste" sw="𝙲-𝙼 𝚟:ctrl,alt,v" se='"+𝙿:"+P' />
    <key width="1" c="selectAll" nw="" ne="𝚜𝚎𝚕𝙰𝚕𝚕:selectAll" sw="C-a:ctrl,a" se="𝚐𝚐𝚅𝙶:ggVG" />
  </row>

  <row height="0.4">
    <key width="0.7692" c="accent_grave" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="accent_circonflexe" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="accent_aigu" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="accent_tilde" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="accent_cedille" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="accent_trema" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.7692" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
  </row>

  <row height="0.4">
    <key c="1" nw="esc" ne="!" sw="𝙵𝟷:f1" se="" />
    <key c="2" nw="" ne="@" sw="𝙵𝟸:f2" se="" />
    <key c="3" nw="" ne="#" sw="𝙵𝟹:f3" se="" />
    <key c="4" nw="" ne="$" sw="𝙵𝟺:f4" se="" />
    <key c="5" nw="" ne="%" sw="𝙵𝟻:f5" se="" />
    <key c="6" nw="" ne="^" sw="𝙵𝟼:f6" se="" />
    <key c="7" nw="" ne="&" sw="𝙵𝟽:f7" se="" />
    <key c="8" nw="" ne="*" sw="𝙵𝟾:f8" se="" />
    <key c="9" nw="" ne="(" sw="𝙵𝟿:f9" se="𝙵𝟷𝟷:f11" />
    <key c="0" nw="" ne=")" sw="𝙵𝟷𝟶:f10" se="𝙵𝟷𝟸:f12" />
  </row>

  <row height="0.6">
    <key width="1.5" c="tab" nw="" n="" ne=">>:>,>,esc" w="" e="" sw="<<:<,<,esc" s="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="q" nw="" ne="˸ 𝚚:esc,':q',enter" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="w" nw="" ne="˸ 𝚠:esc,':w',enter" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="e" nw="" n="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="r" nw="" ne="" sw="C-r:ctrl,r" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="t" nw="" ne="T" sw="C-t:ctrl,t" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="y" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="u" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="i" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="o" nw="" n="" ne="O" sw="C-o:ctrl,o" s="" se="" w="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="p" nw="" ne="P" sw="C-p:ctrl,p" s="" se="" />
  </row>

  <row height="0.6">
    <key shift="0.4" width="1.25" c=">_:ctrl,alt,c" nw="prev:ctrl,alt,up" ne="open:ctrl,alt,right" sw="close:ctrl,alt,left" se="next:ctrl,alt,down" />
    <key width="0.85" c="a" nw="" n="" ne="" sw="C-a:ctrl,a" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="s" nw="" ne="loc §" sw="loc ß" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="d" nw="" ne="" sw="C-d:ctrl,d" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="f" nw="M-f:alt,f" ne="F" sw="C-f:ctrl,f" s="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="g" nw="" ne="G" sw="🔨:enter" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="h" nw="" ne="👈🏿:left" sw="C-h:ctrl,h" se="" w=" :left" />
    <key width="0.85" c="j" nw="jk" ne="👇🏾:down" s=" :down"  sw="" s="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="k" nw="" ne="👆🏻:up" n=" :up" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="l" nw="" ne="👉:right" e=" :right" sw="" se="" />
    <!-- <key width="0.7" c="" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" /> -->
  </row>

  <row height="0.6">
    <key width="1.85" c="shift" nw="" ne="loc capslock" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="z" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="x" nw="" ne="loc †" sw="C-x:ctrl,x" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="c" nw="" ne="" sw="C-c:ctrl,c" se="ç" />
    <key width="0.85" c="v" nw="" ne="V" sw="C-v:ctrl,v" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="b" nw="" ne="\?" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="n" nw="" ne="" sw="C-n:ctrl,n" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="m" nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="0.85" c="<𝙲-𝚌>:ctrl,c" nw="" ne="cd␣↹:ctrl,e,ctrl,u,'cd ',tab" sw="" se="cd␣.↹:ctrl,e,ctrl,u,'cd .',tab"/>
    <key width="1.35" c="🔨:enter" nw="loc voice_typing" ne="" sw="action" se="" />
  </row>

  <row height="0.6">
    <key shift="0.2" width="1.35" c="prev:ctrl,t,k,enter" nw="resize pane:ctrl,n" n="" ne="👆🏻:ctrl,n,up,enter" w="👈🏿:ctrl,n,left,enter" e="👉:ctrl,n,right,enter" sw="" s="👇🏾:ctrl,n,down,enter" se="" />
    <key width="1.35" c="next:ctrl,t,j,enter" nw="move pane:ctrl,h" n="" ne="👆🏻:ctrl,h,up,enter" w="👈🏿:ctrl,h,left,enter" e="👉:ctrl,h,right,enter" sw="" s="👇🏾:ctrl,h,down,enter" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="-" nw="–" ne="+" sw="_" se="—" />
    <key width="1" c=""" nw=""┊":",",left" ne="'" sw="'┊':\'\',left" se="“┊”:“”,left" />
    <key width="1" c="{" nw="{┊}:'{}',left" ne="[" sw="}" se="]" />
    <key width="1" c="(" nw="(┊):'()',left" ne=">" sw=")" se="<" />
    <key width="1.25" c="delete_word" nw="" ne="forward_delete_word" sw="⌧ clear:ctrl,a,selectAll,backspace" se="" />
    <key width="1.5" c="backspace" nw="" ne="delete" sw="⌫┊⌦:backspace,delete" se="" />
    <!-- <key width="0.35" c="" nw="" n="" ne="" e="" sw="" s="" se=""/> -->
  </row>

  <row height="0.6">
    <key shift="0.2" width="1.8" c="new tab:ctrl,t,n" nw="" n="fullscreen:ctrl,p,f" ne="zellij:ctrl,e,ctrl,u,'zellij',enter" e="👉:ctrl,p,r" sw="" s="👇🏾:ctrl,p,d" se="+ pane:ctrl,p,d"/>
    <key width="1" c="c0p*:ctrl,a,selectAll,copy" nw="" ne="𝙲-𝚊,𝙲-𝚌:ctrl,a,ctrl,c" sw='𝚐𝚐𝚅𝙶"+𝚢:ggVG"+y' se='' />
    <key width="1" c="ovrw:ctrl,a,selectAll,paste" nw="" ne="𝙲-𝚊,𝙲-𝚟:ctrl,a,ctrl,v" sw='𝚐𝚐𝚅𝙶"+𝙿:ggVG"+P' se="" />
    <key width="1" c="=" nw="*" ne="?" sw="!" se="=␣:=,space" />
    <key width="1" c="~" nw="" ne="~/↹:'~/',tab" sw="" se="~/.↹:'~/.',tab" />
    <key width="1" c="," nw="`" ne=":" sw="." se=";" />
    <key width="1" c="/" nw="" ne="\\" sw="|" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="👆🏻:up" nw="" ne="loc page_up" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="." nw="" ne="" sw="" se="" />
  </row>

  <row height="0.6">
    <key width="1.5" c="ctrl" nw="loc switch_greekmath" ne="loc meta" sw="loc switch_clipboard" se="switch_numeric" />
    <key width="1.25" c="fn" nw="loc alt" ne="loc change_method" sw="switch_emoji" se="config" />
    <key width="1.25" c="alt" nw="" ne="🐧:meta" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="3" c="space" nw="𝗯𝗿𝗼𝗰𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗶:config" n="switch_forward"  ne="avocado:switch_forward" sw="mercurius:switch_backward" s="switch_backward" w="cursor_left" e="cursor_right"  />
    <key width="1" c="👈🏿:left" nw="" ne="home" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="👇🏾:down" nw="" ne="page_down" sw="" se="" />
    <key width="1" c="👉:right" nw="" ne="end" sw="" se="⇲␣:end,space" />
  </row>

</keyboard>
